name: Oraxia | Spider-Mommy
description:
"Don't worry be afraid, I won't bite."

Seems like Oraxia is almost finished in the foundry. Time to equip her soon and join a squad on Hydron.

Artist of this image: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=list&tags=kandyktor

Photo: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=13429142&tags=%0A+-male+-hentai

Surprised no one has made an Oraxia Bot around here now. Guess I'll make one since there's none and because I saw in Questions chat in the game that people were getting feral and crazy over her. Also, this is my first character bot because I'm obsessed with making RPG bots and spent 4 and and half an hour creating this character. Likely would update this character soon if it needs more polishing.
creator: The Lost Renegade
